title: Emails & Activities feature pinning important activities/ emails
excerpt: Emails and Activates has some great functionality but is missing some features that would makes its use more easy, with the ability to pin emails or activities within this view/ Widget the user can quickly gain an unders…

posts.author: William_O (William Olufson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Emails and Activates has some great functionality but is missing some features that would makes its use more easy, with the ability to pin emails or activities within this view/ Widget the user can quickly gain an understanding of this section so they can formulate a email or action appropriate with no time wasted scrolling through email chains to find the key details that require understanding.

Having the ability to delete or hide emails that are not relevant to the item although there is a filter that refines the emails displayed there is still emails that are taken as part of the item but are not relevant the ‘out over office’ auto replies, emails accidentally associated to an item, and internal conversation not relevant to the client.

posts.author: scoobysnack (Christina McGuire)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree. Maybe the ability to tag eg to collapse, hide, flag, promote to top…

posts.author: lcfmanager (Lauren Rose)
posts.cookedHtml: This is an excellent suggestion and we would greatly benefit from these functions

posts.author: Jeanette (Jeanette)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to see more search functionality such as keyword search. Maybe the ability to filter by email address.

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
William Olufson:

Emails and Activates has some great functionality but is missing some features that would makes its use more easy, with the ability to pin emails or activities within this view/ Widget the user can quickly gain an understanding of this section so they can formulate a email or action appropriate with no time wasted scrolling through email chains to find the key details that require understanding.

Hey @Jeanette you can do that now using Search Emails and Activities

posts.author: Mariia (Mariia Mykhasiuk)
posts.cookedHtml: Totally hear you on this - long email chains and irrelevant auto-replies can make Emails & Activities harder to use. One workaround I’ve found helpful is using the Email to Tasks app for monday.com. It lets you pull in only the relevant emails you want and turn them into structured items on your board. That way, you keep the key messages front and center while avoiding the clutter from ‘out of office’ replies or unrelated threads. Link if you’d like to check it out: Email to Tasks for monday.com
